title: phyllostegia tongaensis
intro: Phyllostegia tongaensis, also known as Tongan phyllostegia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phyllostegia tongaensis include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, reduce fever, and treat skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
